mapper.select: SELECT * FROM exam_room ORDER BY roomId
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exam_room (roomName, roomLocation, roomCapacity, availableSeats, equipment, status, description) VALUES (#{roomName}, #{roomLocation}, #{roomCapacity}, #{roomCapacity}, #{equipment}, #{status}, #{description})
mapper.update: UPDATE exam_room SET roomName = #{roomName}, roomLocation = #{roomLocation}, roomCapacity = #{roomCapacity}, equipment = #{equipment}, status = #{status}, description = #{description} WHERE roomId = #{roomId}
